productDisplayName: Belkin Unisex Move Toploader Black Laptop Bag
description: The Move Toploader from belkin makes for a perfect laptop bag for executives. With absolute comfort for your laptop and loads of organiser space, this bag offers 360 degree access to all your gear when on the go. Bag exterior: 20.5"x10.5"x4" Netbook compartment: 13"x9.1"x1.1" Made of polyester and nylon One main zippered compartment with a velvet padded laptop sleeve and organiser space One zippered compartment with organiser sleeves and card slots One zippered compartment at the back Two patch pockets on the front with velcro closures Adjustable and removable shoulder strap Padded handles for handling ease water bottle holders on either side Care Hand wash in cold water using a mild detergent
